patch:
--- a/alu_8bit.v
+++ b/alu_8bit.v
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 module alu_8bit(
   input [7:0] operand_a,
   input [7:0] operand_b,
   input [2:0] operation,
   output reg [7:0] result
 );
 
-  always @(operand_a) begin
+  always @(operand_a or operand_b or operation) begin
     case(operation)
       3'b000: result = operand_a + operand_b;
       3'b001: result = operand_a - operand_b;
